case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. JULIO C OVALLE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
CRC 3.740 REVIEW
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED DEC-27-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OVALLE, JULIO C

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JULIO OVALLE'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE COURT WILL DIRECT THAT $50 PER MONTH BE PAID TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; NOT REPORTED.

Plaintiff Chase Bank Usa, N.A.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julio Ovalle, Tel. 415.442.6081, Defendant/Claimant appearing on his own behalf.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Julio Ovalle's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part. The Court will direct that $50 per month be paid to the judgment creditor. Order signed. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Not reported.
